section.heading: Preservation of traditional markets

content.p: The Secretary shall, in implementing programs of the Department of Agriculture intended to encourage or assist exports of agricultural commodities, seek to preserve traditional markets for United States agricultural commodities.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–501, title I, § 104, as added Pub. L. 101–624, title XV, § 1531, Nov. 28, 1990, 104 Stat. 3672.)
